displayScaleNote: Humanoid template renders taller than quadruped at same size param. Goblin measured 49px vs unicorn 43px (dragon 41px). Code phase should apply sprite.setScale(43/49) ≈ 0.878 to normalize goblin to unicorn visual height (~43px displayed). This fulfils the 'they race the same' visual commitment.

jump-rise.note: Frames 0-3 = ascent phase. Parity-only; rival never jumps in gameplay.

duck.note: Slide frames [1,2,3,2] — frames duck_1 and duck_2 achieve 41.7% body-top drop (threshold ≥40%). Parity-only; rival never ducks in gameplay.

palette.body: moss-green (#3a7a2e) — dominant wiry skin tone, present in all 24 frames
palette.rags: ember-red (#d94f2a) — tattered cap, loincloth sash, beady eyes; present in 22/24 frames (jump-rise_0 and jump-fall_2 have bright-red eyes at dist~65-72, outside the d<50 threshold in parity-only frames)
palette.shading: track-stone (#4a5a3a) — weathered fabric and skin shadows
